patch_shape: top framing plus one narrow historical current-status note in each target

immutability_boundary.candidate_surface: body preserved verbatim from '## COMMAND PACKET' downward
immutability_boundary.packet_boundary: body preserved verbatim from '## COMMAND PACKET' downward

note: In current branch context, both retained files should read only as historical earlier branch/state records. The first records the earlier candidate-surface decision; the second records the earlier packet-boundary decision. Neither should imply current candidate-surface authority, current packet-boundary authority, current pre-code sequencing authority, launch/execution authority, runtime authority, or promotion meaning.
